privileged_info_summary: The security_config_audit task requires an agent to audit security settings in a Jitsi Meet room named 'ConfidentialBoardRoom'. The agent must join the meeting, open the Security Options dialog, take a screenshot of that dialog, and create a text report. The report must be created at '/home/ga/security_audit.txt' and the screenshot at '/home/ga/security_options_screenshot.png'. Both files must be created during task execution (verified by timestamp checks). The report must contain specific keywords: ConfidentialBoardRoom, E2EE (End-to-End Encryption), Lobby, Password, and 'SECURITY FEATURES STATUS'. The task operates on synthetic data (a local Jitsi Meet instance running on http://localhost:8080).
